title: stylidium costulatum
intro: Stylidium costulatum, also known as the Spineflower or Button Spider Orchid, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Stylidiaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and skin irritations, due to its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Stylidium costulatum include its ability to soothe and calm the skin, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and ointments, which can be applied topically or taken internally to harness its medicinal properties.
